metadata.title: Rollover Daily Todos with Context
metadata.description: Rollover Daily Todos with Context Localization & Tweaks

ast.name: createEl
ast.source: div
ast.target: div

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义日记设置！

ast.target: 未找到自定义周记设置！

ast.name: setButtonText
ast.source: Confirm Undo
ast.target: 确认撤销

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose a heading from your daily note template where rolled todos should be inserted. Todos are collected from the entire source note regardless of heading. None appends them to the end of today's note.
ast.target: 从日记模板中选择一个标题，用于插入滚动过来的待办事项。待办事项会从整个源笔记中收集，无论其标题如何。选择“无”则会将它们附加到今日笔记的末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Skip checkbox todos with no text (for example `- [ ]`) when rolling them into today's note.
ast.target: 在将待办事项滚动到今日笔记时，跳过没有文本的复选框待办事项（例如 `- [ ]`）。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Also roll nested lines under a todo, such as indented notes or sub-items. When disabled, only the parent todo line moves.
ast.target: 同时滚动待办事项下的嵌套行，例如缩进的笔记或子项。禁用时，仅移动父级待办事项行。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When enabled, unfinished todos from the previous daily note are rolled into today's note as soon as today's daily note file is created. This does not run when you merely open an existing note.
ast.target: 启用后，当今日日记文件创建时，前一日日记中未完成的待办事项会自动滚动到今日笔记中。仅打开现有笔记时不会运行此操作。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Characters inside `[...]` that mark a checkbox as done. Default is "xX-". Tasks already marked `[>]` are never rolled again.
ast.target: `[...]` 内标记复选框为已完成的字符。默认为 \"xX-\"。已标记为 `[>]` 的任务不会再次滚动。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Insert an extra blank line between the selected template heading and rolled todos. Only applies when a template heading is selected.
ast.target: 在选定的模板标题和滚动过来的待办事项之间插入一个额外的空行。仅在选择了模板标题时适用。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Template heading
ast.target: 模板标题

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Previous day todo behavior
ast.target: 前一日待办事项行为

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove empty todos in rollover
ast.target: 在滚动时移除空待办事项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Roll over children of todos
ast.target: 滚动待办事项的子项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Automatic rollover on daily note creation
ast.target: 日记创建时自动滚动

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Done status markers
ast.target: 完成状态标记符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add extra blank line between Heading and Todos
ast.target: 在标题和待办事项之间添加额外空行

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取日记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Open a note in the editor first.
ast.target: 请先在编辑器中打开一个笔记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Active file is not in your daily notes folder/format.
ast.target: 当前活动文件不在您的日记文件夹/格式中。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No completed todos to move.
ast.target: 没有已完成的待办事项可移动。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Moved completed todos to the bottom of each section in this note.
ast.target: 已将已完成的待办事项移动到此笔记每个部分的底部。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: RolloverTodosPlugin unable to rollover unfinished todos: Please enable Daily Notes, or Periodic Notes (with daily notes enabled).
ast.target: RolloverTodosPlugin 无法滚动未完成的待办事项：请启用“日记”或“周期笔记”（并启用日记功能）。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rollover: no daily notes found before today.
ast.target: 滚动：今天之前未找到日记。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Rollover: nothing to forward—only open `- [ ]` tasks are forwarded.
ast.target: 滚动：没有内容可转发——仅转发打开的 `- [ ]` 任务。

ast.name: delete
ast.source: Delete todos from previous day
ast.target: 删除前一日的待办事项

ast.name: duplicate
ast.source: Duplicate (keep previous day todos)
ast.target: 复制（保留前一日待办事项）

ast.name: forward
ast.source: Mark todos as forwarded
ast.target: 将待办事项标记为已转发

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rollover Todos Now
ast.target: 立即滚动待办事项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Rollover todos from all previous daily notes
ast.target: 从所有前一日日记滚动待办事项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Move completed todos to bottom of each section
ast.target: 将已完成的待办事项移动到每个部分的底部

ast.name: name
ast.source: Undo last rollover
ast.target: 撤销上一次滚动

ast.name: none
ast.source: None
ast.target: 无

ast.name: text
ast.source: Undo last rollover
ast.target: 撤销上一次滚动

ast.name: text
ast.source: A single rollover command can be undone, which reloads the note files from before the rollover (today plus any changed earlier daily notes). Any text you may have added in those files since then may be deleted.
ast.target: 可以撤销单个滚动操作，这将重新加载滚动前的笔记文件（今日笔记以及任何已更改的早期日记）。您在此期间可能在这些文件中添加的任何文本可能会被删除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note that rollover actions can only be undone for up to 2 minutes after the command occurred, and will be removed from history if the app closes.
ast.target: 请注意，滚动操作只能在命令发生后最多2分钟内撤销，如果应用关闭，将从历史记录中移除。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Changes made with undo:
ast.target: 撤销所做的更改：
